2606.20244.title: SPOT-E: Test-Time Entropy Shaping with Visual Spotlights for Frozen VLMs
2606.20244.paper_summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) often underperform on evidence intensive tasks because decisive visual evidence are small, localized, and easy to overlook, leading to failures in evidence readout even when high-level reasoning is intact. Prior inference-time visual interventions can improve grounding without retraining, but they are largely open-loop and lack a mechanism to verify whether highlighted evidence is actually used. We study answer-span prediction entropy as a model-internal feedback signal and show that naive entropy minimization is ambiguous, since low entropy may arise from evidence-grounded confidence or shortcut collapse. To resolve this ambiguity, we introduce low-entropy anchors and an entropy-shaping objective that reduces answer uncertainty while preserving baseline high-confidence tokens. We instantiate this principle in SPOT-E, a plug-and-play test-time method that produces question-conditioned spotlights, optimized per instance via light-weight tuning based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Across all benchmarks and different VLM families, SPOT-E yields consistent gains and improved robustness under visual corruptions. Code is publicly available at: \url{https://github.com/YinBo0927/SPOT-E}
2606.20244.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）在證據密集型任務上往往表現不佳，因為決定性的視覺證據通常是小型的、局部的，且容易被忽視，這導致即使高層次推理完好，仍然會在證據讀取上失敗。先前的推理時視覺干預可以在不重新訓練的情況下改善基礎，但它們大多是開環的，缺乏驗證突出證據是否實際被使用的機制。我們研究答案範圍預測熵作為模型內部的反饋信號，並顯示天真的熵最小化是模糊的，因為低熵可能源於基於證據的信心或捷徑崩潰。為了解決這一模糊性，我們引入低熵錨點和一個熵塑形目標，該目標在保留基線高信心標記的同時減少答案的不確定性。我們在SPOT-E中具體實現了這一原則，這是一種即插即用的測試時方法，通過基於群體相對策略優化（GRPO）的輕量調整，為每個實例優化生成問題條件的聚光燈。在所有基準測試和不同的VLM家族中，SPOT-E都產生了一致的增益並在視覺損壞下提高了穩健性。代碼已公開可用於： \url{https://github.com/YinBo0927/SPOT-E}
2606.20244.author: Bo Yin et.al.
2606.20244.authors: Bo Yin, Xiaobin Hu, Chengming Xu, Ruolin Shen, Mo Yang, Jiangning Zhang, Peng-Tao Jiang, Cheng Tan, Shuicheng YAN
